---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for Mythos
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

Lead with the *problem*, not the solution. One paragraph.

If you can't name **one real user** (yourself counts) who hits this problem today, file this as a Discussion instead.

## Proposed solution

What you want to exist. Be specific — name the file, CLI, hook, or skill that would change.

## Alternatives considered

What else you tried or thought about. Why didn't it work?

## Acceptance criteria

How would we know the feature is *done*? List 3–5 checkable criteria.

- [ ] …
- [ ] …
- [ ] …

## Out of scope

What this proposal explicitly does NOT include. (This prevents scope creep during review.)

## Research backing (if applicable)

If your proposed feature implements a known algorithm or pattern, link the paper / blog post / talk. Mythos primitives prefer paper citations — see `PAPERS.md`.
